title: ajax major
intro: Ajax major, also known as Ajuga reptans, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Ajax major include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
